title: $PROFILE_VIDEO
text: $PROFILE_VIDEO Set the video attributes for profile characters in unifields. $PROFILE_VIDEO { = } VideoAttribute { , VideoAttributeN , ...} Arguments VideoAttribute —video attribute code. To define more than one video attribute for each argument, separate them with commas and enclose them in parentheses. Defaults Assignment file: ny application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $PROFILE_VIDEO sets the video attributes for profile characters that appear in unifields. Example: $PROFILE_VIDEO $PROFILE_VIDEO = (UND,BOR) Copy To make the active field appear with white letters on a blue background, determine the color number by adding 56 (white foreground) and 1 (blue background): $PROFILE_VIDEO COL=57 Copy Related Links Video Attributes Video attributes determine the Uniface index colors used in an application, and additional attributes such as bold, blink, bright and underline used character mode that can be used to highlight current fields and occurrences.
